task: Go to the URL and complete the AngularJS form by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/angularjs-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed the task by navigating to the specified URL, identifying all required fields in the AngularJS form, and filling them out. It correctly handled the file upload by creating a temporary file and using `setInputFiles`. After filling all fields, the agent submitted the form and validated its success by observing the 'Success! Form submitted successfully!' message. The agent demonstrated good problem-solving skills, especially when initially encountering an issue with `fs.writeFile` in the REPL and quickly correcting its approach. All steps were executed logically and effectively.
